echo "=== File Sizes ==="
find "C:/Users/qi'yue/Desktop/Claire/Claire/.claude/skills/feishu-wiki-to-obsidian" -type f -exec wc -l {} \\;)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/qi'yue/Desktop/Claire/Claire/.claude/skills" && python3 -c "
import os
from pathlib import Path

SKILLS_DIR = Path\('.'\)

# Simple rename mapping
RENAMES = {
    'baoyu-format-markdown': 'md-formatter',
    'baoyu-url-to-markdown': 'url-to-md',
    'baoyu-post-to-wechat': 'wechat-publisher',
    'baoyu-post-to-x': 'x-publisher',
    'feishu-wiki-to-obsidian': 'feishu-to-obsidian',
    'pdf-processing-pro': 'pdf-processor',
    'law-to-markdown': 'law-to-md',
    'writing-plans': 'writing-planner',
    'writing-skills': 'writing-enhancer',
    'content-creation-publisher': 'content-publisher',
    'content-research-writer': 'content-researcher',
    'academic-paper': 'paper-writer',
    'academic-paper-reviewer': 'paper-reviewer',
    'paper-analysis-assistant': 'paper-analyzer',
    'design-taste-frontend': 'design-taste',
    'frontend-design': 'frontend-designer',
    'minimalist-ui': 'minimalist-design',
    'high-end-visual-design': 'premium-visual',
    'ui-ux-pro-max-skill': 'ui-ux-pro',
    'video-creation-pro': 'video-pro',
    'video-creation-suite': 'video-suite',
    'video-transcript-downloader': 'transcript-downloader',
    'ecommerce-copywriter': 'ecommerce-copy',
    'ecommerce-video-marketing': 'ecommerce-video',
    'systematic-debugging': 'systematic-debug',
    'test-driven-development': 'tdd-helper',
    'receiving-code-review': 'code-review-receiver',
    'requesting-code-review': 'code-review-requester',
    'finishing-a-development-branch': 'branch-finisher',
    'using-git-worktrees': 'git-worktree',
    'subagent-driven-development': 'subagent-dev',
    'executing-plans': 'plan-executor',
    'verification-before-completion': 'completion-verifier',
    'deep-research': 'deep-researcher',
    'anysearch-skill': 'anysearch',
    'product-manager-toolkit': 'pm-toolkit',
    'product-marketing-copywriter': 'marketing-copy',
    'product-video-creator': 'product-video',
    'viral-video-copywriting': 'viral-copy',
    'obsidian-skills-integrated': 'obsidian-skills',
    'tailored-resume-generator': 'resume-generator',
    'legal-assistant-skills-main': 'legal-assistant',
    'NanoBanana-PPT-Skills': 'nanobanana-ppt',
    'SkillOpt': 'skill-optimizer',
    'dream-video-prompt-generator': 'dream-video',
    'infinitetalk-shopping-avatar': 'shopping-avatar',
    'digital-avatar-shopping-video': 'avatar-shopping',
    'agentkit-multimedia-shopping': 'multimedia-shopping',
    'pet-commerce-creator': 'pet-commerce',
    'wechat-hotspot-publisher': 'wechat-hotspot',
    'wechatsync-publisher': 'wechatsync',
    'framework-price-deviation-comparator': 'price-deviation',
    'qiaomu-x-article-publisher': 'qiaomu-x',
    'image-to-code': 'image-to-code',
    'imagegen-frontend-mobile': 'imagegen-mobile',
    'imagegen-frontend-web': 'imagegen-web',
    'redesign-existing-projects': 'project-redesign',
    'storage-analyzer': 'storage-analyzer',
    'xiaomi-fds-auto-upload': 'xiaomi-fds',
}

renamed = 0
skipped = 0

for old_name, new_name in RENAMES.items\(\):
    old_path = SKILLS_DIR / old_name
    new_path = SKILLS_DIR / new_name

    if not old_path.exists\(\):
        skipped += 1
        continue

    if old_name == new_name:
        skipped += 1
        continue

    if new_path.exists\(\):
        skipped += 1
        continue

    try:
        old_path.rename\(new_path\)
        print\(f'OK: {old_name} -> {new_name}'\)
        renamed += 1
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'FAIL: {old_name}: {e}'\)

print\(f'\\nDone: {renamed} renamed, {skipped} skipped'\)
" 2>&1 | head -30)
